name: Full-Stack Web Application
description: A complete full-stack web application with React frontend, REST API backend, database, authentication, and cloud deployment. Use this template for customer-facing products, internal tools, dashboards, and SaaS applications.

phases.name: Foundation
phases.description: Establish the project skeleton, tooling, and development environment so every subsequent phase builds on a consistent, reproducible base.

epics.name: Repository & Tooling Setup
epics.description: Initialize the repository, configure build tools, linting, formatting, and CI pipeline.

stories.title: Initialize React project with Vite and TypeScript
stories.description: Scaffold the frontend using Vite with the React-TypeScript template, configure path aliases, and verify the dev server starts cleanly.
completion_criteria: `pnpm dev` starts without errors and the browser shows the default Vite+React page at localhost:5173
TypeScript strict mode is enabled in tsconfig.json and `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0

stories.title: Configure ESLint, Prettier, and pre-commit hooks
stories.description: Add ESLint with the recommended TypeScript ruleset, Prettier for formatting, and a Husky pre-commit hook that runs lint-staged.
completion_criteria: `npx eslint src/` exits 0 on the freshly scaffolded code
Committing a file with a trailing space is rejected by the pre-commit hook

stories.title: Set up GitHub Actions CI pipeline
stories.description: Create a workflow that runs on every pull request: install dependencies, type-check, lint, and run tests.
completion_criteria: The workflow file exists at .github/workflows/ci.yml and triggers on pull_request to main
Opening a test PR with a deliberate type error causes the CI job to fail at the tsc step

epics.name: Database & ORM Setup
epics.description: Configure the database, ORM, and migration tooling so backend stories can create schemas from day one.

stories.title: Provision local PostgreSQL with Docker Compose
stories.description: Create a docker-compose.yml that runs PostgreSQL 15 with a named volume, exposes port 5432, and sets database name, user, and password via environment variables.
completion_criteria: `docker compose up -d db` starts a healthy PostgreSQL container accessible at localhost:5432
A .env.example file documents all required environment variables with placeholder values

stories.title: Configure Prisma ORM and run initial migration
stories.description: Install Prisma, initialize the schema with the PostgreSQL data source, create an initial empty migration, and verify the Prisma client generates without errors.
completion_criteria: `npx prisma migrate dev` applies the initial migration without errors against the local database
`npx prisma generate` produces the TypeScript client and `npx tsc --noEmit` still passes

epics.name: Backend API Scaffold
epics.description: Stand up the Node.js/Express (or Fastify) server with health check, error handling middleware, and environment configuration.

stories.title: Initialize Express server with TypeScript and health endpoint
stories.description: Create the backend package, configure ts-node-dev for development, and implement a GET /health endpoint that returns 200 with a JSON body.
completion_criteria: `GET /health` returns HTTP 200 with body `{"status": "ok", "timestamp": "<iso-string>"}`
The server respects the PORT environment variable and defaults to 3001

stories.title: Add global error handling and request logging middleware
stories.description: Implement an Express error handler that returns structured JSON errors and a request logger using pino or morgan.
completion_criteria: Throwing an error inside a route handler returns HTTP 500 with body `{"error": "Internal Server Error", "requestId": "<uuid>"}`
Every request is logged with method, path, status code, and response time in milliseconds

epics.name: Frontend Architecture
epics.description: Establish the React component architecture, routing, state management library, and design system baseline.

stories.title: Configure React Router and base route layout
stories.description: Install React Router v6, define a root layout component with navigation shell, and create stub routes for the main application sections.
completion_criteria: Navigating to `/`, `/dashboard`, and `/settings` renders different page components without a 404
The browser back button correctly navigates between visited routes

stories.title: Set up Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens
stories.description: Install and configure Tailwind CSS, extend the theme with the project's color palette, typography scale, and spacing tokens.
completion_criteria: Tailwind utility classes render correctly in the browser with the configured theme values
`npx tailwindcss --content './src/**/*.tsx' --minify` produces a non-empty CSS output

stories.title: Configure Zustand store and TanStack Query client
stories.description: Install Zustand and TanStack Query, create the root QueryClientProvider, and set up a minimal Zustand store for UI state.
completion_criteria: A test component that reads from the Zustand store and triggers a TanStack Query fetch renders without runtime errors
`npx tsc --noEmit` passes with Zustand and TanStack Query types resolved

phases.name: Authentication
phases.description: Implement a complete authentication system covering registration, login, session management, and route protection.

epics.name: User Account Model
epics.description: Define the user schema, password hashing, and the database layer for account management.

stories.title: Create User schema with Prisma and run migration
stories.description: Add a User model to the Prisma schema with id, email, passwordHash, createdAt, and updatedAt fields. Run and commit the migration.
completion_criteria: The users table exists in the database with the correct columns after `prisma migrate dev`
The `email` column has a unique index enforced at the database level

stories.title: Implement user repository with bcrypt password hashing
stories.description: Create a UserRepository class with createUser and findByEmail methods. Passwords must be hashed with bcrypt (cost factor 12) before storage.
completion_criteria: Calling `createUser` with a plaintext password stores a bcrypt hash (not the plaintext) in the database
Unit tests for createUser and findByEmail pass with 100% branch coverage on the happy path and duplicate-email error path

epics.name: JWT Authentication Endpoints
epics.description: Implement login, registration, token refresh, and logout API endpoints.

stories.title: Implement POST /auth/register endpoint
stories.description: Accept email and password, validate format (email regex, password minimum 8 chars), hash the password, create the user, and return a signed JWT.
completion_criteria: POST /auth/register with valid credentials returns HTTP 201 and a JWT in the response body
POST /auth/register with an already-registered email returns HTTP 409 with error message 'Email already registered'
POST /auth/register with a password shorter than 8 characters returns HTTP 400

stories.title: Implement POST /auth/login and POST /auth/refresh endpoints
stories.description: Login verifies credentials and returns an access token (15 min TTL) plus a refresh token (7 day TTL) in an httpOnly cookie. Refresh exchanges the cookie for a new access token.
completion_criteria: POST /auth/login with correct credentials returns HTTP 200 with an access token and sets a Refresh-Token httpOnly cookie
POST /auth/login with incorrect password returns HTTP 401
POST /auth/refresh with a valid refresh token cookie returns a new access token without requiring password re-entry

epics.name: Frontend Authentication Flow
epics.description: Build the login and registration pages and protect authenticated routes.

stories.title: Build Login and Registration pages with react-hook-form
stories.description: Create Login and Register page components with form validation using react-hook-form and Zod schemas. Show field-level validation errors inline.
completion_criteria: Submitting the login form with an empty email field shows the validation error 'Email is required' below the email input without making an API call
Successful login stores the access token in memory (not localStorage) and redirects to /dashboard

stories.title: Implement protected route wrapper and auth state store
stories.description: Create a ProtectedRoute component that redirects unauthenticated users to /login, and a Zustand auth store that manages the current user state.
completion_criteria: Navigating to /dashboard without being authenticated redirects to /login and preserves the intended destination as a `redirect` query parameter
After login, the app redirects to the originally intended destination if a redirect parameter was present

phases.name: Core Features
phases.description: Implement the primary business functionality that defines the application's value proposition.

epics.name: Core Data Model
epics.description: Define and migrate the primary domain entities that the application manages.

stories.title: Design and migrate the primary domain schema
stories.description: Add the main domain entities to the Prisma schema, establish relationships (foreign keys, indexes), and run the migration.
completion_criteria: All new tables exist in the database with the correct column types, nullable constraints, and indexes after migration
Prisma client generates without errors and `npx tsc --noEmit` passes

stories.title: Implement CRUD API endpoints for the primary resource
stories.description: Create REST endpoints for the primary domain resource: GET (list + single), POST (create), PATCH (update), DELETE. All endpoints require authentication.
completion_criteria: GET /api/{resource} returns HTTP 200 with a paginated list of the authenticated user's resources
POST /api/{resource} without a valid JWT returns HTTP 401
DELETE /api/{resource}/{id} for a resource owned by a different user returns HTTP 403

epics.name: Core UI Views
epics.description: Build the main list view, detail view, and create/edit forms for the primary domain resource.

stories.title: Build the resource list view with TanStack Query
stories.description: Create a list page that fetches and displays the user's resources using TanStack Query. Include loading skeleton and empty state.
completion_criteria: The list page shows a loading skeleton while data is fetching and displays the resource list on success
The list page shows a 'No items yet. Create your first one.' empty state when the API returns an empty array

stories.title: Build the create/edit form with optimistic updates
stories.description: Implement a form that creates or edits a resource. On submit, apply an optimistic update to the TanStack Query cache and roll back on error.
completion_criteria: Submitting the create form immediately adds a placeholder item to the list before the API responds
If the API returns an error, the optimistic item is removed and an error toast is displayed

epics.name: Search and Filtering
epics.description: Add server-side search and client-side filtering for the primary resource list.

stories.title: Implement server-side full-text search endpoint
stories.description: Add a `?q=` query parameter to the list endpoint that filters results using PostgreSQL full-text search on the resource's title and description fields.
completion_criteria: GET /api/{resource}?q=test returns only resources whose title or description contains the word 'test' (case-insensitive)
The search query is debounced to 300ms on the frontend to avoid a request on every keystroke

phases.name: Testing
phases.description: Achieve the target test coverage with unit, integration, and end-to-end tests that validate critical user journeys.

epics.name: Backend Unit and Integration Tests
epics.description: Cover the API endpoints and business logic with Vitest unit tests and supertest integration tests.

stories.title: Write integration tests for all auth endpoints
stories.description: Use supertest against a test database to verify the register, login, and refresh endpoints with both happy-path and error-path scenarios.
completion_criteria: All auth endpoint test cases pass with `pnpm test` against a clean test database
The test suite covers at least: successful registration, duplicate email rejection, successful login, wrong password, expired token refresh

stories.title: Write integration tests for core CRUD endpoints
stories.description: Test the primary resource CRUD endpoints including authorization checks (own resource vs. other user's resource).
completion_criteria: All CRUD endpoint tests pass including the 403 check for cross-user access
Tests use a shared test database setup/teardown that runs in under 10 seconds total

epics.name: Frontend Component Tests
epics.description: Test React components with Testing Library for behavior-driven assertions.

stories.title: Write component tests for the login and registration forms
stories.description: Use Testing Library to test form validation messages, submission behavior, and error display for the auth forms.
completion_criteria: Tests verify that submitting an empty login form shows validation errors without calling the API
Tests verify that a failed login API response displays the error message returned by the server

epics.name: End-to-End Tests
epics.description: Playwright tests covering the critical paths: registration, login, create resource, and delete resource.

stories.title: Write Playwright E2E tests for the authentication flow
stories.description: Automate the full registration → login → dashboard navigation flow in a real browser against the running application.
completion_criteria: The E2E test registers a new user, logs in with those credentials, and asserts the dashboard page title is visible
The test runs in under 30 seconds in CI (headless Chrome)

phases.name: Deployment
phases.description: Package the application for production, configure environment-specific settings, and deploy to the target hosting platform.

epics.name: Production Build
epics.description: Optimize the frontend build and containerize the backend for production deployment.

stories.title: Optimize Vite production build and measure bundle size
stories.description: Configure Vite's build settings for production (code splitting, tree shaking, asset hashing) and measure the gzipped bundle size.
completion_criteria: `pnpm build` exits 0 and produces a dist/ directory with hashed asset filenames
The gzipped main bundle is under 200KB (before lazy-loaded chunks)

stories.title: Create production Dockerfile for the backend
stories.description: Write a multi-stage Dockerfile that builds the TypeScript, installs only production dependencies, and runs as a non-root user.
completion_criteria: `docker build -t app-backend .` completes without errors and the image size is under 300MB
The container runs as a non-root user (verified with `docker inspect` showing a non-zero UID)

epics.name: CI/CD and Environment Configuration
epics.description: Extend the CI pipeline with deployment stages and manage environment-specific configuration.

stories.title: Add deployment workflow for staging environment
stories.description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys to staging on every push to main, after CI passes.
completion_criteria: Pushing a commit to main triggers the deploy workflow and the staging URL returns HTTP 200 within 5 minutes
A failed deployment sends a notification to the configured Slack channel or email

stories.title: Document environment variables and secrets management
stories.description: Create a comprehensive .env.example and deployment runbook covering all required environment variables and how secrets are managed in each environment.
completion_criteria: .env.example contains every environment variable the application reads, with a comment explaining each variable's purpose and format
The deployment runbook documents how to rotate the JWT secret without downtime
